name: Cheesecake Ice Cream (Riv Pe)
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Cream cheese, softened but not cool
1 pinch Kosher salt or table salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill mixing bowl and beaters.
2. Beat cream cheese on medium speed until soft and smooth.
3. Gradually add sugar, 1/4 cup at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Add sour cream, then the heavy cream.
5. Mix in salt, lemon juice, and vanilla. Beat just until mixture is thick and smooth.
6. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
7. Wash beaters and bowl and chill again.
8. Put chilled mixture in a cold mixing bowl and beat, gradually increasing speed from low to medium, beating the mixture until light and creamy, about 3 minutes.
9. Serve at once or freeze up to 24 hours. Allow to soften for 15 minutes in the refrigerator if frozen.
10. Garnish with strawberries.
SUPERFINE SUGAR can be made by processing granulated sugar in your food processor.
